title: Bank of million patient samples
author: Ari Turunen
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: More than a million tissue samples and tens of thousands of blood samples are stored in Auria, the first hospital biobank in Finland. The biobank is also able to combine donor-related data to the collections, providing significant assistance for research. The data can be requested from the donor of the sample, patient records or national registers.
